difficulty.reason: Perennial, drought-tolerant, spreading ground cover, irresistibly soft leaves

growth_stages.name: Dormant
growth_stages.look_for: Silvery-green rosette close to the ground, some winter-worn leaves

growth_stages.name: Spring Growth
growth_stages.look_for: New velvety silver leaves unfurling from the center

prompt.en: Touch the new leaves -- they feel like a lamb's ear! So soft and fuzzy!
prompt.da: Roer ved de nye blade -- de foeles som et lammeoere! Saa bloede og lodne!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Tall fuzzy flower spikes with tiny purple flowers

prompt.en: The flower tower is fuzzy too! Run your fingers up it -- feel the tiny flowers!
prompt.da: Blomstertaarnet er ogsaa lodent! Koer dine fingre op ad det -- maarke de smaa blomster!

growth_stages.name: Late Season
growth_stages.look_for: Plant spreading wider, lower leaves may dry out

prompt.en: Pull off the crispy brown leaves at the bottom -- only keep the soft ones!
prompt.da: Traek de sprode brune blade af i bunden -- behold kun de bloede!

human_readable.en: Very drought tolerant. Prefers dry conditions. Overwatering causes rot.
human_readable.da: Meget toerketolerant. Foretraekker toerre forhold. Overvanding giver raad.

harvest.notes: Not harvested for food. Purely sensory/tactile plant. Remove spent flower spikes to keep tidy.

companion_plants.notes: Part of the sensory edge in Bed A. Silvery leaves provide visual contrast.
